asset.title: Review Approve
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough clearly demonstrates the review and approval workflow when auto-allow is disabled. The agent proposes changes to the spreadsheet, which are then approved by the user.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows the transition from auto-allow to manual review mode, followed by agent proposals and user acceptance.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the entire loop: disabling auto-allow, sending the command, viewing proposed cells, and clicking accept.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with clear orange highlighting for proposed cell changes.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the NodeRoom ecosystem, featuring the spreadsheet, chat, agent, and room trace.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time state updates and interactive elements.

legibility.evidence: Most text is readable, though some trace logs and small badges are slightly dense.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial and audit workflows requiring human-in-the-loop verification.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the proposal state and the explicit action required to commit changes.

observedEvidence: Agent proposal state in spreadsheet cells
Trace log updates reflecting the approval

defects.observed: The proposal badges and cell values are slightly small and dense, making them hard to read at lower resolutions.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the zoom level of the browser window during recording to improve cell legibility.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Turn off auto-allow to review and approve agent proposals before they are committed to your spreadsheet.
